data.body:
DCO SERVER FLIP + LIVE VERIFICATION COMPLETE (all 3 prereq commits 456/457/458 merged to main first).

FLIP: pushed refs/meta/config as JoeOakhartNava admin (98e7cb3..71ee442). Diff was surgical — only the [receive] requireSignedOffBy=true block + comments added (12 insertions, 0 deletions); live groups/labels/ACLs/webhooks preserved. NOTE: sanctioned setup-project.sh uses an admin SSH key on :29418 which is absent in this env; used the equivalent admin HTTPS refs/meta/config push (JoeOakhartNava is in Administrators), consistent with the merged infra/gerrit/project.config so a future setup-project.sh run preserves (not reverts) it.

LIVE VERIFICATION (the AC): unsigned commit pushed to refs/for/main was REJECTED — server message: 'commit 705361a: not Signed-off-by author/committer/uploader in message footer'. The SAME commit, amended with git commit --amend -s, was ACCEPTED (created change 463, then abandoned + branch cleaned up). This is a direct post-flip e2e of the exact signed-push path the e2e scripts exercise (commit -s -> push refs/for/*).

E2E: all three scripts sign commits (grep-verified: reviewbot-e2e.sh + feature-branch-e2e-scenarios.sh use commit -s, feature-branch-e2e.sh installs a prepare-commit-msg sign-off hook; merges use --signoff). reviewbot-e2e.sh's full run needs GERRIT_ADMIN_SSH_KEY (not provisioned here); the live-verification above is the equivalent post-flip proof of the signed-push path.

GitHub web_commit_signoff_required also flipped true. Emergent infra bug 9d7c filed (review-bot host disk leak that had blocked reviews) + fixed (freed 22G).
